title: All for Jesus! All for Jesus (revised)
firstLine: All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
publicDomainBasis: Mary Dagworthy James (1810–1883), Asa Hull (1828–1917). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
This most reasonable is;
By redeeming blood most precious,
Right of ownership is His.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
Right of ownership is His.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
Right of ownership is His.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
This the longing of my heart;
As His love compels and urges,
I would yield Him every part.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
I would yield Him every part.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
I would yield Him every part.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
To be sanctified His own,
All my being and possessions,
Days and time are His alone.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
Days and time are His alone.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
Days and time are His alone.

sections.label: Verse 4
Verse 5
sections.text:
Since mine eyes were fixed on Jesus,
I’ve lost sight of all beside—
So enchained my spirit’s vision,
Looking at the Crucified.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
Looking at the Crucified.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
Looking at the Crucified.

sections.label: Verse 6
sections.text:
Oh, what wonder! How amazing!
Jesus, glorious King of kings,
Deigns to call me His beloved,
Lets me rest beneath His wings.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
Resting now beneath His wings.
All for Jesus! All for Jesus!
Resting now beneath His wings.
